purpose: One-time migration that seeds knownPeers from current group members, runs the purge sweep, and shows a dismissible notice banner to the user on first post-migration visit to /contacts.

public_api.name: isMigrationNoticeAcknowledged
public_api.description: Returns true when the user has dismissed the S3 migration notice banner (lp_knownPeersMigrationNoticeAck_v1 is set).

public_api.name: acknowledgeMigrationNotice
public_api.description: Writes lp_knownPeersMigrationNoticeAck_v1='1' to localStorage. Idempotent and never throws.

public_api.name: MigrationNoticeBanner
public_api.description: Dismissible info banner for contacts page. Renders when knownPeersMigrationComplete() and not yet acknowledged. Sets ack flag and hides on dismiss click.

test_targets: acknowledgeMigrationNotice sets flag; subsequent isMigrationNoticeAcknowledged returns true
MigrationNoticeBanner hidden when knownPeersMigrationComplete() is false
MigrationNoticeBanner visible when migration complete and not acknowledged
MigrationNoticeBanner hides after dismiss click and sets ack flag
Migration effect seeds knownPeers then purges before setting flag
Migration effect skipped on subsequent boot when flag is present
